code-large.name: qwen2.5-coder:32b-instruct-q4_K_M
code-large.use: Primary coding agent — complex tasks, architecture, multi-file edits

code-fast.name: qwen2.5-coder:7b-instruct-q8_0
code-fast.use: Quick tasks — single file edits, lookups, fast responses

embed.name: nomic-embed-text
embed.use: Semantic search across workspace — find relevant files by meaning

gpu.note: Run code-large OR code-fast at a time, not both. embed can run alongside either.
